changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Assign AHRI demo inventory equipment/reagents to the matching test section when the item name or project label contains a department name.
changeSet.sql: WITH department_map(label, department_id) AS ( VALUES ('Bacteriology', 168), ('Bioanalytical', 174), ('Bioequivalence', 175), ('Biorepository', 182), ('Genomics', 172), ('Immunology', 59), ('Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease', 177), ('MNTD', 177), ('Medical Laboratory', 181), ('CTD', 181), ('Pathology', 176), ('Pharmaceuticals', 178), ('Pharmaceutical', 178), ('Traditional and Modern Medicine', 173), ('Traditional Medicine', 173), ('Tuberculosis', 180), ('Virology and Vaccine', 179), ('Viral Vaccine', 179), ('Virology', 179) ) UPDATE clinlims.inventory_item i SET department_test_section_id = dm.department_id FROM department_map dm WHERE ( LOWER(i.name) LIKE LOWER(dm.label) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(i.project_name, '')) LIKE LOWER(dm.label) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(i.category, '')) LIKE LOWER(dm.label) || '%' ) AND i.item_type IN ('REAGENT', 'CARTRIDGE', 'ENZYME', 'ANTIBIOTICS');
